Package neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated

package neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    neqsim.process.fielddevelopment
    Field Development Engine for NeqSim.
  • Class
    Description
    AquiferDrive
    Gas-reservoir drive with steady-state aquifer water influx (Fetkovich-style support).
    FlowlineBranch
    A flowline (or generic pressure-drop) branch in an integrated production network.
    GasLiftNetworkOptimizer
    Gas-lift allocation optimiser using the equal-slope (Lagrangian) criterion.
    GasLiftNetworkOptimizer.AllocationResult
    Result of a gas-lift allocation.
    GasLiftNetworkOptimizer.LiftWell
    A well registered for gas-lift allocation.
    GasLiftPerformanceCurve
    Gas-lift performance curve (GLPC) relating injected lift-gas rate to produced oil rate.
    IntegratedProductionModel
    Integrated "reservoir to market" production model.
    IntegratedProductionModel.WellUnit
    Internal representation of a single well and its tie-in.
    IntegratedSolveResult
    Result of a single steady-state solve of an IntegratedProductionModel.
    MaterialBalanceGasDrive
    Volumetric (depletion) gas-reservoir drive based on the p/z material balance.
    NetworkBranch
    A directed branch in an integrated production network.
    NetworkNewtonSolver
    Global pressure-flow solver for an integrated production network.
    NetworkNewtonSolver.NetworkSolutionResult
    Result of a network solve.
    NetworkNode
    A node in an integrated production network.
    NetworkNode.NodeType
    Classification of a network node.
    OilTankDrive
    Undersaturated oil-reservoir depletion drive based on a single-tank compressibility balance.
    ProductionProfile
    A time-marched production profile produced by IntegratedProductionModel.runProfile(double, double).
    ProductionProfile.Point
    A single point on a production profile.
    ReservoirDrive
    A reservoir drive (material balance) model for integrated reservoir-to-market simulation.
    ReservoirToMarketOptimizer
    Reservoir-to-market production optimiser.
    ReservoirToMarketOptimizer.Objective
    Optimisation objective.
    ReservoirToMarketOptimizer.OptimizationResult
    Result of a reservoir-to-market optimisation.
    WellBranch
    A well branch in an integrated production network.
    WellDeliverabilityCurve
    Well deliverability curve - a fast, monotone surrogate of a well's combined IPR + VLP behaviour.
    WellTestMatcher
    Fits an inflow-performance relationship (IPR) to measured well-test data and produces a fast WellDeliverabilityCurve surrogate.
    WellTestMatcher.MatchResult
    Result of a well-test match.
    WellTestMatcher.TestPoint
    A single well-test observation.
